summary: Complete e2e testing of blog modal enhancements, CTA buttons, and partner sections. All 10 blog posts display with images. Blog modal features working: scroll indicator (mouse pill with bouncing dot), scroll indicator disappears after scrolling, CTA buttons present in all posts with correct labels and navigation. All 4 tested CTAs work correctly (Golf Near Palma -> /book-tee-times, Stay & Play -> #hotels, Art & Culture -> #cafes-bars, Golf & Gastronomy -> #restaurants).

backend_api_tests.blog_posts_structure: PASS - All posts have required fields (id, slug, title, excerpt, content, image, author, created_at, category)
backend_api_tests.blog_cta_buttons: PASS - All 10 posts have CTA with label and url
backend_api_tests.golf_near_palma_cta: PASS - Label: 'Book your next Tee Time in Palma Now!', URL: /book-tee-times
backend_api_tests.stay_and_play_cta: PASS - Label: 'Explore Our Hotel Partners', URL: #hotels
backend_api_tests.golf_gastronomy_cta: PASS - Label: 'Explore Our Restaurant Partners', URL: #restaurants
backend_api_tests.art_culture_cta: PASS - Label: 'Discover Cafes & Bars in Mallorca', URL: #cafes-bars
backend_api_tests.all_partners_endpoint: PASS - Returns golf_courses(16), hotels(38), restaurants(49), beach_clubs(12), cafe_bars(36)

frontend_ui_tests.homepage_loads: PASS - All sections render (hero, golf, hotels, restaurants, beach clubs, cafes, blog, contact, footer)
frontend_ui_tests.blog_section: PASS - 10 blog cards displayed with images
frontend_ui_tests.blog_modal_open: PASS - Modal opens on Read More click
frontend_ui_tests.scroll_indicator: PASS - Mouse pill with bouncing dot visible on modal open
frontend_ui_tests.scroll_indicator_hide: PASS - Scroll indicator disappears after scrolling >60px
frontend_ui_tests.cta_button_present: PASS - CTA button visible at bottom of modal content
frontend_ui_tests.partner_sections_images: PASS - Hotels(10), Restaurants(10), Cafes(10), Beach Clubs(10) images visible
frontend_ui_tests.search_functionality: PASS - Search 'golf' returns 52 results including landing pages
frontend_ui_tests.console_errors: PASS - No console errors on homepage load

passed_tests: Blog API returns 10 posts with all required fields
All 10 blog posts have CTA buttons with label and url
Golf Near Palma CTA: 'Book your next Tee Time in Palma Now!' -> /book-tee-times
Stay & Play CTA: 'Explore Our Hotel Partners' -> #hotels
Golf & Gastronomy CTA: 'Explore Our Restaurant Partners' -> #restaurants
Art & Culture CTA: 'Discover Cafes & Bars in Mallorca' -> #cafes-bars
Homepage loads all sections without errors
Blog section shows 10 blog posts with images
Blog modal opens with scroll indicator (mouse pill with bouncing dot)
Scroll indicator disappears after scrolling
Blog modal has max-w-2xl (672px) and max-h-[85vh]
CTA button present at bottom of each blog modal
CTA navigation to /book-tee-times works
CTA scroll to #hotels section works
CTA scroll to #cafes-bars section works
CTA scroll to #restaurants section works
Search functionality returns results for 'golf'
/book-tee-times page loads correctly
/golf-holidays-mallorca page loads correctly
No console errors on homepage
critical_code_review_comments: Blog.jsx correctly implements scroll indicator with showScrollHint state and handleModalScroll callback
CTA navigation properly handles both internal routes (navigate) and hash anchors (scrollIntoView)
Modal uses max-w-2xl (672px) and max-h-[85vh] for proper sizing
DataContext.jsx getDisplayedItems bug fixed - properly checks for number type before calling slice()
All 10 blog posts in backend/server.py have contextual CTA buttons with correct URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog modal enhancements verified: 1) Scroll indicator (mouse pill with animated bouncing dot) appears on modal open and disappears after scrolling 60px. 2) Modal is max-w-2xl (672px) and max-h-[85vh]. 3) All 10 blog posts have CTA buttons - 5 navigate to /book-tee-times, 1 to #hotels, 2 to #restaurants, 1 to #cafes-bars. 4) DataContext getDisplayedItems fixed to handle number vs object settings. 5) No orphan test data issues - RestaurantCard working. 6) Partner sections all display images correctly.
